messages: I'm moving into a new apartment — 14 Maple Street, Unit 3B — and my lease officially begins on July 17, 2026. The building assigned me a move-in window from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM on that day.

The property manager is Elena Park; she asked that I give at least 48 hours' notice before moving and that I coordinate by text. Her contact is 555-0147; also the building doesn't allow moves on Sundays.

The unit is on the third floor and the building doesn't have an elevator. The stairwell is narrow — about 28 inches — with a 90-degree turn at one landing, and the apartment doorways are roughly 30 inches wide.
The curb in front has a 20-minute loading limit, and commercial trucks are required to park two blocks away. Also, the resident parking spot assigned to me (#42) won't be available until August 1.
The lease allows only one dog under 25 pounds and requires a $350 nonrefundable pet fee; I'm bringing a 20-pound beagle.
It's a 12-month lease ending July 16, 2027, and the security deposit is $1,300.
I'm debating paint finishes for the living room — should I use eggshell or satin for durability and easy cleaning in a high-traffic area?
